taskDescription: Complete the crossword on Minerals, Electrolytes, and Acid-Base Balance

words.clue: Master regulator peptide hormone of iron homeostasis, made by the liver
Plasma iron transport protein that carries two Fe3+ ions
Soluble iron storage protein; best single marker of body iron stores
Basolateral iron exporter on enterocytes, target of hepcidin
Transporter that moves Fe2+ into the enterocyte from the intestinal lumen (abbreviation)
Vitamin that enhances non-haem iron absorption in the gut (letter)
Type of anaemia with microcytic hypochromic red cells on blood film
Bone density scan used to diagnose osteoporosis (abbreviation)
Acid-base disorder caused by severe diarrhoea with low pH and low bicarbonate
Insoluble aggregate form of stored iron seen in iron overload

overallFeedback.feedback: Review iron absorption pathways, hepcidin regulation, and acid-base disorders.
Good work! Brush up on the diagnostic markers and storage forms of iron.
Excellent! You have a thorough understanding of minerals and acid-base balance.
